transcript: Speaker A: भारत का राष्ट्रीय खेल क्या है? [What is the national sport of India?]
on_screen_text:
भारत का राष्ट्रीय खेल क्या है? [What is the national sport of India?]
A. Cricket
B. Hockey
C. Kabaddi
Bank of India + ₹ 2,01,108 Credited to Account 0002
अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App 😍 [To become the richest person in your family, download Zinglish App 😍]
Zinglish: English Speaking App
summary: The ad begins with a trivia question about India's national sport. Once the correct answer is selected, a simulated bank notification shows a large cash credit, suggesting users can earn money. It concludes with a call to action to download the Zinglish English Speaking App to become wealthy.
